title: corysanthes aconitiflorus
intro: Corysanthes aconitiflorus, also known as the Coralroot, is a perennial orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Corysanthes aconitiflorus include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially treating conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
